name: Turkey or Chicken and Broccoli Casserole
recipeIngredient: 20 oz Bag of cut broccoli (not chopped), cooked until crisp-tender and drained well
2 cups Turkey or chicken, cooked and cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Layer your favorite casserole topping (cheese croutons, crunchy onions, etc.) at the bottom of a 2-quart casserole dish.
3. In the casserole dish, lightly oiled, layer the meat first, then the broccoli, followed by the soup mixture and cheese.
4. Heat the soup together with seasonings, ensuring it is not diluted.
5. Cover the dish and bake for 45-60 minutes until the casserole starts to bubble.
